quotes.text: Hatred is never appeased by hatred. By non-hatred alone is hatred appeased. This is an eternal law.
All conditioned things are impermanent. Strive on with diligence.
quotes.source: Mahaparinibbana Sutta (last words of the Buddha)

quotes.text: You yourself must strive. The Buddhas only point the way.
Just as a mother would protect her only child at the risk of her own life, cultivate a boundless heart toward all beings.
Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth, faithfulness the best relationship.
Three things cannot be long hidden: the sun, the moon, and the truth.
quotes.attribution_note: Often quoted in Buddhist contexts; verify primary source for publication.

quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quotes.attribution_note: Commonly attributed; use with attribution note in app.

quotes.text: Radiate boundless love toward the entire world — above, below, and across — unhindered, without ill will or enmity.
